body_en: In the beginning there was neither existence nor non-existence. Then arose the One. This was the golden womb, the first seed of mind.
body_hi: प्रारम्भ में न सत् था न असत्। फिर एक उत्पन्न हुआ। यही हिरण्यगर्भ, मन का प्रथम बीज था।
body_te: ఆరంభంలో సత్తూ లేదు అసత్తూ లేదు. అప్పుడు ఒకటి ఉద్భవించింది. ఇదే హిరణ్యగర్భం.

body_en: Who really knows? The gods came afterwards. Who then knows whence this creation has arisen?
body_hi: कौन जानता है? देवता बाद में आए। फिर कौन जानता है कि यह सृष्टि कहाँ से उद्भूत हुई?
body_te: ఎవరు ఎరుగుదురు? దేవతలు తర్వాత వచ్చారు. ఈ సృష్టి ఎక్కడ నుండి?

body_en: The Rig Veda contains 1,028 hymns in 10 mandalas. It is the oldest known text in any Indo-European language.
body_hi: ऋग्वेद में १०२८ सूक्त दस मंडलों में हैं। यह किसी भी इंडो-यूरोपीय भाषा में ज्ञात सबसे पुराना पाठ है।
body_te: ఋగ్వేదంలో 1028 సూక్తాలు 10 మండలాలలో ఉన్నాయి. అత్యంత పురాతన ఇండో-యూరోపియన్ గ్రంథం.

body_en: Rig, Yajur, Sama and Atharva — hymns, ritual, melody and worldly wisdom together form the Vedic corpus.
body_hi: ऋग्, यजुर्, साम, अथर्व — स्तुति, यज्ञ, सामगान और लौकिक ज्ञान मिलकर वैदिक संहिता बनाते हैं।
body_te: ఋగ్, యజుర్, సామ, అథర్వ — స్తోత్రాలు, యజ్ఞాలు, సామాలు, లౌకిక జ్ఞానం కలిసి వేద సాహిత్యం.

body_en: That thou art — the identity of the individual self with ultimate reality, from the Chandogya Upanishad.
body_hi: तत् त्वम् असि — छान्दोग्य उपनिषद का महावाक्य। जीवात्मा और ब्रह्म की एकता।
body_te: తత్ త్వమ్ అసి — ఛాందోగ్య ఉపనిషత్తు మహావాక్యం. ఆత్మ బ్రహ్మ ఏకత్వం.

body_en: Valmiki's epic of Rama's exile, Sita's abduction and victory over Ravana. The Adi Kavya with 24,000 verses.
body_hi: वाल्मीकि रामायण — राम का वनवास, सीता हरण और रावण पर विजय। आदि काव्य, २४००० श्लोक।
body_te: వాల్మీకి రామాయణం — రాముని వనవాసం, సీత అపహరణ, రావణుని ఓటమి. 24000 శ్లోకాలు.

body_en: The world's longest epic. Contains the Gita. 'What is not here is nowhere else.'
body_hi: विश्व का सबसे लंबा महाकाव्य। गीता इसमें है। 'यहाँ जो नहीं, वह कहीं नहीं।'
body_te: ప్రపంచంలోనే అతి పొడవైన ఇతిహాసం. గీత ఇందులో ఉంది.

body_en: Krishna's teaching to Arjuna on duty without attachment to results. 700 verses, 18 chapters.
body_hi: कृष्ण का अर्जुन को कर्म में अधिकार, फल में अनासक्ति का उपदेश। ७०० श्लोक।
body_te: కృష్ణుడు అర్జునునికి కర్మ, ఫలాసక్తి రహిత బోధ. 700 శ్లోకాలు.

body_en: Om Bhur Bhuvah Svah. Tat savitur varenyam... May the divine light illuminate our intellect.
body_hi: ॐ भूर्भुवः स्वः। तत्सवितुर्वरेण्यं... हमारी बुद्धि को दिव्य प्रकाश प्रेरित करे।
body_te: ఓం భూర్భువః స్వః. తత్ సవితుర్వరేణ్యం... మా బుద్ధిని ప్రకాశింపజేయుగాక.

body_en: Five elements — space, air, fire, water, earth — form all matter and life in Vedic thought.
body_hi: आकाश, वायु, अग्नि, जल, पृथ्वी — पाँच तत्वों से समस्त पदार्थ और जीवन बनता है।
body_te: ఆకాశం, వాయువు, అగ్ని, జలం, భూమి — ఐదు భూతాల నుండి ప్రపంచం.

body_en: Dharma, Artha, Kama, Moksha — the four aims that together make a complete human life.
body_hi: धर्म, अर्थ, काम, मोक्ष — चार पुरुषार्थ पूर्ण जीवन के आधार हैं।
body_te: ధర్మం, అర్థం, కామం, మోక్షం — నాలుగు పురుషార్థాలు సంపూర్ణ జీవితానికి ఆధారం.

body_en: The moon travels through 27 lunar mansions. Each nakshatra carries a deity and special qualities used in panchangam.
body_hi: चंद्र २७ नक्षत्रों में घूमता है। प्रत्येक नक्षत्र का अधिदेवता और गुण होते हैं।
body_te: చంద్రుడు 27 నక్షత్రాల గుండా ప్రయాణిస్తాడు. ప్రతి నక్షత్రానికి అధిదేవత ఉంటుంది.

body_en: The most beloved Purana. Its 10th book sings the divine play (lila) of Krishna.
body_hi: सबसे प्रिय पुराण। दशम स्कन्ध में कृष्ण की लीलाओं का गान है।
body_te: అత్యంత ప్రియమైన పురాణం. 10వ స్కంధంలో కృష్ణ లీలలు.

body_en: Both the Chinese Tao and Vedic Rta describe the unseen order that sustains the cosmos. The wise align with it.
body_hi: चीनी ताओ और वैदिक ऋत — दोनों अदृश्य व्यवस्था का वर्णन करते हैं जिसके साथ ऋषि जीवन जीते हैं।
body_te: చైనా తావో, వేద ఋతం — రెండూ విశ్వ నియమాన్ని సూచిస్తాయి. జ్ఞాని దానితో కలిసి జీవిస్తాడు.
source: Comparative philosophy — Rig Veda & Tao Te Ching

body_en: Pythagoras traveled to the East. His ideas on soul, numbers and rebirth closely parallel Upanishadic teachings.
body_hi: पाइथागोरस पूर्व की यात्रा पर गए। उनकी आत्मा, संख्या और पुनर्जन्म की अवधारणाएँ उपनिषदों से मिलती हैं।
body_te: పైథాగరస్ తూర్పుకు ప్రయాణించాడు. ఆత్మ, సంఖ్యలు, పునర్జన్మ బోధలు ఉపనిషత్తులతో సరిపోతాయి.

body_en: We worship the three-eyed one, fragrant, who nourishes all beings. May he liberate us from death.
body_hi: त्र्यम्बकं यजामहे सुगन्धिं पुष्टिवर्धनम्। उर्वारुकमिव बन्धनान् मृत्योर्मुक्षीय माऽमृतात्।
body_te: మృత్యుంజయుని యెడల భక్తి, సువాసన, పోషకుడు. మరణ బంధనాల నుండి విముక్తి కావాలి.

body_en: I am Brahman — the Mahavakya affirming the self is ultimate reality.
body_hi: अहं ब्रह्मास्मि — मैं ब्रह्म हूँ।

body_en: The cosmic person (Purusha) pervades all. From him the Vedas, creatures and order arose.
body_hi: सहस्रशीर्षा पुरुषः सहस्राक्षः सहस्रपात्।
body_te: వేల తలల పురుషుడు, వేల కన్నులు, వేల పాదాలు.

body_en: The Gita teaches equanimity: treat success and failure alike, act without attachment.
body_hi: समत्वं योग उच्यते — समता ही योग है।

body_en: Eight limbs: yama, niyama, asana, pranayama, pratyahara, dharana, dhyana, samadhi.
body_hi: यम, नियम, आसन, प्राणायाम, प्रत्याहार, धारणा, ध्यान, समाधि।
body_te: యమ, నియమ, ఆసన, ప్రాణాయామ, ప్రత్యాహార, ధారణ, ధ్యాన, సమాధి.

body_en: Nature (Prakriti) and consciousness (Purusha) — two eternal principles whose interplay creates the manifest world.
body_hi: प्रकृति और पुरुष — सृष्टि के दो मूल तत्व।

body_en: Time is without beginning or end, the wheel of existence turns eternally.
body_hi: कालः अनादि अनन्तः — काल अनादि-अनन्त है।

body_en: Four stages of life: brahmacharya, grihastha, vanaprastha, sannyasa.
body_hi: ब्रह्मचर्य, गृहस्थ, वानप्रस्थ, संन्यास — जीवन के चार आश्रम।

body_en: Satya, Treta, Dvapara, Kali — the four ages declining in virtue, cycling endlessly.
body_hi: सत्य, त्रेता, द्वापर, कलि — चार युग।

body_en: The primordial golden egg from which the universe and Brahma emerged.
body_hi: हिरण्यगर्भ — ब्रह्माण्ड का आदि स्वर्ण अंडा।

body_en: Contains precise formulas for rituals and sacrifices that maintain cosmic order (rta).
body_hi: यजुर्वेद — यज्ञ विधियों का संग्रह।

body_en: Consciousness is Brahman — the highest knowledge.
body_hi: प्रज्ञानं ब्रह्म — चेतना ही ब्रह्म है।

body_en: Sita's trial by fire proves purity and dharma in adversity.
body_hi: अग्नि परीक्षा — धर्म और शुद्धता की परीक्षा।

body_en: Aphorisms reconciling Vedanta: Brahman is one without second.
body_hi: ब्रह्म सूत्र — वेदान्त का सार।

body_en: Om Shanti Shanti Shanti — peace in body, mind, and spirit.
body_hi: ॐ शान्तिः शान्तिः शान्तिः — तीनों स्तरों पर शान्ति।

body_en: The invisible law that upholds the universe; dharma aligns humans to it.
body_hi: ऋत — विश्व का अदृश्य नियमानुसार।

body_en: The linga symbolizes the formless infinite manifesting as creation.
body_hi: लिंग — निराकार का साकार प्रतीक।

body_en: Actions shape future births; liberation ends the cycle.
body_hi: कर्म फल देता है, मोक्ष चक्र तोड़ता है।

body_en: The visible deity sustaining life; measured time in yugas and days.
body_hi: सूर्य — जीवन का आधार, काल का मापक।

body_en: In the beginning was the Word (Om); vibration gave rise to the cosmos.
body_hi: ओम् से सृष्टि — नाद ब्रह्म।

body_en: The Veda of chants; music as the highest form of worship.
body_hi: सामवेद — गान का वेद।

body_en: Not this, not that — the via negativa describing the ineffable Brahman.
body_hi: नेति नेति — ब्रह्म का निषेधात्मक वर्णन।

body_en: The flute calls souls back to the divine; symbol of surrender.
body_hi: बाँसुरी — आत्मा को बुलाने वाला नाद।

body_en: Four sources of knowledge: perception, inference, comparison, testimony.
body_hi: प्रत्यक्ष, अनुमान, उपमान, शब्द — ज्ञान के चार साधन।

body_en: The primordial sound containing all; past, present, future in one syllable.
body_hi: ॐ — तीनों कालों का सार।

body_en: Trees and herbs hold healing and wisdom; Aranyaka texts from forest.
body_hi: वृक्ष और औषधियाँ — प्रकृति के गुरु।

body_en: Contains the Devi Mahatmya; the Goddess as supreme protector.
body_hi: दुर्गा सप्तशती — देवी की महिमा।

body_en: Dharma is subtle; what is right in one context may not be in another.
body_hi: धर्म सूक्ष्म है — परिस्थिति अनुसार।

body_en: The moon governs the mind; waxing and waning mirrors mental states.
body_hi: चंद्र मन का कारक।

body_en: Ritual (Li) brings harmony; virtue flows from proper conduct.
body_hi: ली — सदाचार से सामंजस्य।

body_en: You cannot step twice into the same river; all is change, yet Logos remains.
body_hi: एक ही नदी में दो बार नहीं उतरा जा सकता।

body_en: Spells, medicine, statecraft and household hymns for worldly life.
body_hi: अथर्ववेद — लोक-जीवन के मंत्र।

body_en: The subtle essence is the whole; know that and you know all.
body_hi: सूक्ष्म तत्त्व ही समग्र है।

body_en: When duty conflicts with attachment, the Gita resolves the crisis of action.
body_hi: कर्तव्य और आसक्ति का संघर्ष — गीता का समाधान।

body_en: Ultimate reality composed of indivisible atoms (paramanu) combined by unseen force (adrishta).
body_hi: परमाणु — अदृश्य शक्ति से संयोग।

body_en: O Goddess of knowledge, remove darkness of ignorance, grant clarity.
body_hi: या कुन्देन्दुतुषारहारधवला... सरस्वति नमस्तुभ्यम्।

body_en: Ganga, Yamuna, Saraswati — living goddesses that purify body and soul.
body_hi: गंगा यमुना सरस्वती — जीवंत देवियाँ।

body_en: Detailed account of the soul's journey after death and the law of karma.
body_hi: मृत्यु के बाद आत्मा की यात्रा।

body_en: 16 rites of passage sanctify life from conception to cremation.
body_hi: १६ संस्कार — जन्म से मृत्यु तक पवित्रीकरण।

body_en: Sun, Moon, Mars, Mercury, Jupiter, Venus, Saturn, Rahu, Ketu influence destiny.
body_hi: नवग्रह — भाग्य को प्रभावित करने वाले।

body_en: Non-action (Wu Wei): act in harmony with the Tao without forcing.
body_hi: वू वेई — बिना बल के कर्म।

body_en: The unexamined life is not worth living; true wisdom is knowing one's ignorance.
body_hi: अपरीक्षित जीवन जीने योग्य नहीं।

body_en: Speech as creative power; the universe is spoken into being.
body_hi: वाक् — सृष्टि की रचनात्मक शक्ति।

body_en: Prose texts explaining the meaning and method of Vedic rituals.
body_hi: यज्ञों की व्याख्या — ब्राह्मण।

body_en: Introduces a personal Lord (Ishvara) alongside impersonal Brahman.
body_hi: व्यक्त ईश्वर और ब्रह्म — दोनों।

body_en: In the Sabha, Draupadi asks: when one is lost, is the wife lost too? Justice challenged.
body_hi: सभा में द्रौपदी का प्रश्न — धर्म का संकट।

body_en: Dharma defined by Vedic injunctions; correct ritual action yields results.
body_hi: वेद विहित कर्म ही धर्म।

body_en: Salutations to Ganesha: the one with curved trunk and mighty form, remover of obstacles.
body_hi: वक्रतुण्ड महाकाय सूर्यकोटि समप्रभ।

body_en: The five sacred trees at Rama's hermitage: ashvattha, bilva, etc.
body_hi: पंचवटी — पाँच पवित्र वृक्ष।

body_en: Duties of a king: protect dharma, people, and sacred learning.
body_hi: राजा का धर्म — प्रजा और धर्म की रक्षा।

body_en: Dharma, Artha, Kama — balanced pursuit before Moksha.
body_hi: धर्म, अर्थ, काम — तीन वर्ग।

body_en: The nodes of the moon; eclipses as cosmic events teaching impermanence.
body_hi: ग्रहण — अस्थायित्व का पाठ।

body_en: 64 hexagrams map change; wisdom lies in timing and balance.
body_hi: ६४ षट्कोण — परिवर्तन का मानचित्र।

body_en: All emanates from the One; the soul's return is through contemplation.
body_hi: सब एक से निकला; वापसी ध्यान से।

body_en: Strength, devotion, fearlessness — Hanuman embodies service without ego.
body_hi: बल, भक्ति, निर्भयता — अहंकार रहित सेवा।

body_en: The Goddess speaks: I am the queen, the gatherer of treasures, the knower.
By whom is the mind impelled? Brahman is the ear of the ear, mind of mind.
body_hi: केनेषितं... — ब्रह्म ही सबका चालक।

body_en: Even from the enemy camp, one who chooses dharma finds protection in Rama.
body_hi: शत्रु पक्ष से भी धर्म चुनने वाला रक्षित होता है।
body_te: శత్రు శిబిరం నుండి ధర్మం ఎంచుకున్న వాడు రక్షించబడతాడు.

body_en: Health is balance of doshas; prevention and diet before medicine.
body_hi: दोष संतुलन ही स्वास्थ्य।

body_en: The shining dawn awakens the world and the gods; symbol of renewal.
body_hi: उषा — नवीनीकरण की देवी।

body_en: Small acts of kindness and truth accumulate great merit across births.
body_hi: छोटे पुण्य भी जन्म-जन्मान्तर फल देते हैं।

body_en: Giving up for the highest; inner renunciation greater than outer.
body_hi: बाह्य त्याग से भीतर का त्याग श्रेष्ठ।

body_en: Each of 27 nakshatras ruled by a deity shaping character and events.
body_hi: प्रत्येक नक्षत्र का अपना अधिदेवता।

body_en: The vital force animating all; without prana, form is inert.
body_hi: प्राण — जीवन शक्ति।

body_en: The invoking priest channels hymns that uphold rta during yajna.
body_hi: होता — यज्ञ में मंत्रों का वाहक।

body_en: Two birds on one tree: one eats the fruit, the other watches — self and witness.
body_hi: एक पेड़ पर दो पक्षी — भोक्ता और साक्षी।
body_te: ఒక చెట్టుపై రెండు పక్షులు — భోక్త, సాక్షి.

body_en: Devotion gives power to cross oceans; service is the highest strength.
body_hi: भक्ति से समुद्र लांघा जाता है।

body_en: Father of surgery; 300 procedures, emphasis on hygiene and anatomy.
body_hi: शल्य चिकित्सा के जनक।

body_en: Hymns to the nine planets for pacification and balance of karma.
body_hi: नवग्रह शांति के स्तोत्र।

body_en: Ancient science of plant life; treat trees as patients with specific remedies.
body_hi: वृक्षों का चिकित्सा शास्त्र।

body_en: Detailed yogic practices and the path to liberation through knowledge and action.
body_hi: योग की विस्तृत विधि।

body_en: The householder supports all other stages; hospitality is highest dharma.
body_hi: गृहस्थ सभी आश्रमों का आधार।

body_en: The year as a yajna; seasons cycle reflecting inner spiritual seasons.
body_hi: वर्ष एक यज्ञ — ऋतुचक्र आध्यात्मिक।

body_en: Was I a man dreaming I was a butterfly, or a butterfly dreaming I was a man?
body_hi: क्या मैं मनुष्य था जो तितली का सपना देख रहा था?

body_en: Suffering, its cause, its end, the path — parallel to Vedic duhkha and moksha.
body_hi: दुःख, कारण, निरोध, मार्ग।

body_en: O Durga, we take refuge in you who is the power behind all gods.
body_hi: दुर्गा — देवताओं की शक्ति।

body_en: Tat savitur varenyam — we meditate on the adorable light of the divine sun.
body_hi: तत्सवितुर्वरेण्यं — दिव्य सविता का ध्यान।

body_en: The universe is full; from fullness comes fullness; fullness remains.
body_hi: ॐ पूर्णमदः पूर्णमिदं...

body_en: Even in war, Karna gave without asking; dharma of giving at any cost.
body_hi: दान — मृत्यु के समय भी।

body_en: A king's first duty is the welfare of the people; espionage and law for order.
body_hi: प्रजा सुखे सुखं राज्ञः — प्रजा के सुख में राजा का सुख।

body_en: The fierce winds that bring rain and fertility; power of nature's renewal.
body_hi: मरुत — वर्षा और उर्वरता के देवता।

body_en: Vishnu as fish saves Manu and the Vedas during the great deluge.
body_hi: महाप्रलय में वेदों की रक्षा।

body_en: Giving purifies the giver; the right gift at right time to right person.
body_hi: दान से दाता पवित्र होता है।

body_en: Time as a wheel; past, present, future turn; the wise step off the wheel.
body_hi: कालचक्र — विद्वान चक्र से बाहर निकलता है।

body_en: This being human is a guest house; every morning a new arrival of joy or sorrow.
body_hi: मनुष्य एक अतिथि-गृह है — हर सुबह नया आगमन।
body_te: మనిషి అతిథి గృహం; ప్రతి ఉదయం కొత్త ఆగమనం.

body_en: The self-arisen; no creator before the One; ground of all existence.
body_hi: स्वयंभू — आदि कारण।

body_en: Shiksha, Kalpa, Vyakarana, Nirukta, Chhandas, Jyotisha — limbs that preserve the Veda.
body_hi: शिक्षा, कल्प, व्याकरण, निरुक्त, छन्द, ज्योतिष।
body_te: శిక్ష, కల్ప, వ్యాకరణ, నిరుక్త, ఛందస్సు, జ్యోతిషం.

body_en: The self within all beings, smaller than a mustard seed, greater than the cosmos.
body_hi: सब में वही आत्मा — अणु से छोटा, ब्रह्माण्ड से बड़ा।
body_te: అందరిలోని ఆత్మ అణువు కంటే చిన్నది, విశ్వం కంటే పెద్దది.

body_en: Terrible vow of celibacy for father's happiness; dharma above personal desire.
body_hi: पिता के लिए भीषण प्रतिज्ञा — व्यक्तिगत इच्छा से ऊपर धर्म।
body_te: తండ్రి సంతోషం కోసం భీష్ముని భయంకర ప్రతిజ్ఞ.

body_en: The most complete grammar ever; 4000 rules generating infinite Sanskrit.
body_hi: संस्कृत की सबसे पूर्ण व्याकरण — ४००० सूत्र।

body_en: Homage to the fierce one; the auspicious form that destroys and renews.
body_hi: नमः शिवाय — रुद्र का स्तवन।
